beefs.about: Undid revision 1360760258 by Obie Book a Nobie (talk) I'm talking about you. If you're going to do such edits, then per WP:BRD, as your WP:BOLD edits have been reverted already, you - as a party - are encouraged to talk about it in the talk page, instead of continuing this back and forth.
quotes: Undid revision 1360760258 by Obie Book a Nobie (talk) I'm talking about you. If you're going to do such edits, then per WP:BRD, as your WP:BOLD edits have been reverted already, you - as a party - are encouraged to talk about it in the talk page, instead of continuing this back and forth.

This has already been brought up on the talk page. Users on here just don't understand that you can't call an attack a "terrorist attack" or "Anti-Muslim" in nature when no conviction has been made. The accused is innocent until he is convicted of a crime.

Undid revision 1360759157 by Obi2canibe (The attacks have NOT been classified as terrorism, there has been no conviction yet. A court date for trial hasn't even been decided yet. The attack was NOT anti-Muslim in nature as the official reports do NOT conclude anything of that sort. This was NOT a terrorist attack and thaccussed has NOT been convicted of any crime yet.)
